PERL.note: EOL August 2019, final release 2020-08-13. UTF was drafted in 2020 and drivers did not implement it until 2021-2022. Perl driver was retired before it could migrate. Never implemented a UTF runner. Left with 16 legacy per-spec runners totaling ~5,448 LOC --- a cost-of-not-migrating data point rather than a migration savings data point.
